content_body: Very well appointed cabin. It had everything you could think of. The kitchen had everything you need to make that gourmet meal. The game room had many board games that came in handy on the rainy days. The tree house with its fantastic fireplace, view and hot tub is the place to enjoy your evenings with a nice glass of your favorite adult beverage. Great place for a large family or group like we had. Highly recommended.
title: Serendipity Had Everything We Could Think Of!
